title: Unequal Recreational Losses? Revealed Preference Evidence of Campsite Closures in Hawaiʻi
text:
Libraries


Show code
library(tigris)
library(sf)
library(dplyr)
library(readr)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyr)

title: Unequal Recreational Losses? Revealed Preference Evidence of Campsite Closures in Hawaiʻi
text:
Load Data


Show code
library(readr)
welfare_2019_zip<- read_csv("welfare_2019_ind.csv")
welfare_2018_zip <- read_csv("welfare_2018_ind.csv")
#welfare_2018_zip$site=NULL
#welfare_2018_zip$id=NULL
welfare_2020_zip <- read_csv("welfare_2020_ind.csv")
welfare_2021_zip <- read_csv("welfare_2021_ind.csv")
welfare_2022_zip <- read_csv("welfare_2022_ind.csv")
welfare_2023_zip <- read_csv("welfare_2023_ind.csv")
#average_welfare_loss_per_zip <- read_csv("~/Downloads/average_welfare_loss_per_zip.csv")



welfare_2018_zip$Year=2018
welfare_2019_zip$Year=2019
welfare_2020_zip$Year=2020
welfare_2021_zip$Year=2021
welfare_2022_zip$Year=2022
welfare_2023_zip$Year=2023

average_welfare_loss_per_zip =rbind(welfare_2018_zip,welfare_2019_zip,welfare_2020_zip,welfare_2021_zip,welfare_2022_zip,welfare_2023_zip)

zip_tract_032022 <- read_csv("data/zip_tract_032022.csv")

dishawaii <- readRDS("data/dishawaii.rds")

blockIRA=read_sf("data//EPA_IRA_Disadvantage_Hawaii.shp")

title: Unequal Recreational Losses? Revealed Preference Evidence of Campsite Closures in Hawaiʻi
text:
Disadvantage Communities


Show code
dishawaii=subset(dishawaii,ST_ABBREV=="HI")

ejscreen_data <- dishawaii %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(
    env_burden = any(c_across(c(P_PM25,P_OZONE,P_DSLPM,P_RSEI_AIR,P_PTRAF,
P_LDPNT,P_PNPL,P_PRMP,P_PTSDF,P_UST,P_PWDIS,P_NO2,P_DWATER,P_D2_PM25,P_D2_OZONE,P_D2_DSLPM,P_D2_RSEI_AIR,P_D2_PTRAF,P_D2_LDPNT,P_D2_PNPL,P_D2_PRMP,P_D2_PTSDF,P_D2_UST,P_D2_PWDIS,P_D2_NO2,P_D2_DWATER)) >= 90, na.rm = TRUE),
    soc_vulnerable = any(c_across(c(P_PEOPCOLORPCT,P_LOWINCPCT,P_UNEMPPCT,P_DISABILITYPCT,P_LINGISOPCT,P_LESSHSPCT,P_UNDER5PCT,P_OVER64PCT,P_LIFEEXPPCT)) >= 90, na.rm = TRUE),
    DAC_flag = as.integer(env_burden & soc_vulnerable)
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

title: Unequal Recreational Losses? Revealed Preference Evidence of Campsite Closures in Hawaiʻi
text:
Zip to Tract
Better way to match the data is by using the HUD USPS ZIP Code Crosswalk Files. This will link the zip codes to census track. This especially useful to integrate datasets that report by ZIP (e.g. user addresses) with data reported by census tract (like CEJST).


Show code
t=merge(zip_tract_032022,average_welfare_loss_per_zip, by.x = "ZIP", by.y = "zip")

block_data <- blockIRA %>%
    mutate(tract_geoid = substr(ID, 1, 11)) %>%
    group_by(tract_geoid) %>%
    summarise(
        num_yes = sum(Disadvanta == "Yes", na.rm = TRUE),
        num_no  = sum(Disadvanta == "No", na.rm = TRUE),
        mixed_response = if_else(num_yes > 0 & num_no > 0, TRUE, FALSE),      CEJST = sum(CEJST == "Yes", na.rm = TRUE)
    )

block_data$CEJST <- ifelse(block_data$CEJST > 0, 1, 0)


t=merge(t,block_data, by.x = "TRACT", by.y = "tract_geoid")

t=merge(t,ejscreen_data, by.x = "TRACT", by.y = "ID")

title: Unequal Recreational Losses? Revealed Preference Evidence of Campsite Closures in Hawaiʻi
text:
Table


Show code
library(officer)
library(flextable)
library(dplyr)
library(sf)

summary_table <- t %>%
    st_drop_geometry() %>%
    group_by(env_burden, island) %>%
    summarise(
        variance = var(mean_value), 
        median = median(mean_value), 
        mean = mean(mean_value),
        .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    mutate(
        env_burden = ifelse(env_burden, "Disadvantaged", "Not Disadvantaged")
    )

summary_table1 <- t %>%
    st_drop_geometry() %>%
    group_by(soc_vulnerable, island) %>%
    summarise(
        variance = var(mean_value), 
        median = median(mean_value), 
        mean = mean(mean_value),
        .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    mutate(
        soc_vulnerable = ifelse(soc_vulnerable, "Disadvantaged", "Not Disadvantaged")
    )




professional_table <- summary_table %>%
    flextable() %>%
    set_header_labels(
        Indicator = "Indicator",
        island = "Island",
        variance = "Variance",
        median = "Median ($)",
        mean = "Mean ($)"
    ) %>%
    colformat_double(j = "variance", digits = 0) %>%
    colformat_double(j = c("median", "mean"), digits = 2) %>%
    merge_v(j = "Indicator") %>%
    theme_booktabs() %>%
    bold(part = "header") %>%
    align(j = c("variance", "median", "mean"), align = "center", part = "all") %>%
    bg(part = "header", bg = "white") %>%
    color(part = "header", color = "black") %>%
    bg(i = seq(2, nrow(summary_table), by = 2), bg = "#F2F2F2", part = "body") %>%
    autofit() %>%
    border_outer(border = fp_border(color = "black", width = 2)) %>%
    border_inner_h(border = fp_border(color = "gray", width = 1)) %>%
    border_inner_v(border = fp_border(color = "gray", width = 1)) %>%
    font(fontname = "Times New Roman", part = "all") %>%  # Add Times New Roman
    fontsize(size = 12, part = "all")  # Standard 12pt font


Warning: Some column(s) can not be found in the original data.frame:
"Indicator".
